_doc: Allow-list for frontend-design-budget gate (P8). Files importing the listed enterprise or admin dashboard components must appear here with a reason. JSON does not allow comments — use this _doc key for explanatory prose. New imports require a PR that adds the file here. Components monitored: MetricCard, RunActivityChart, SuccessRateChart, SparkLine, PnlKpiCard, PnlSparkline, PnlTrendChart, SparklineChart, SpendTrendChart.

files.reason: usage analytics page; activity chart is the primary content for operator audience
operator home page; metric cards and activity chart are the primary workflow entry point
system-level P&L page; KPI cards and trend chart are the core content for billing operators
governance spending page; spend trend chart is the primary analytical view for finance operators
client pulse list row; sparkline provides at-a-glance health trend for CSM operators
intervention proposal modal; sparkline gives context on the client health trend triggering the intervention
P&L table row; sparkline provides per-org revenue trend for billing operators
